publicationStmt.publisher: Taylor Institution Library, one of the Bodleian Libraries of the University of Oxford,

availability.licence: XML files are available for download under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License .
Images are available for download under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International License .

note.p: Transcribed from: St Anne's College Library Stack 821.13 1 Images scanned from St Anne's College Library Stack 821.13 1
This is a facsimile and transcription of Beowulf. It is held by St Anne's College Library (shelf mark Stack 821.13 1) and by the Taylor Institution Library (shelf mark 16.A.7).
The transcription was encoded in TEI P5 XML by Duncan Jones.

respStmt.resp: edited with textual foot-notes, index of proper names, and alphabetical glossary, by
respStmt.persName: A. J. Wyatt, M.A. Lond., B.A. Cantab.

projectDesc.p: Created by encoding transcription from printed text.

editorialDecl.p: This edition is semi-diplomatic and has been designed to accompany the Kelmscott edition The Tale of Beowulf. Wyatt's numbered headers have been omitted as they do not correspond to the Kelmscott edition and could cause confusion. Printed erratum from the front pages of the edition have been fixed. All footnotes are as found in the Wyatt text.

change.label: fixes, glossary notes and line numbers entered.
